input.command: echo "=== mongo svc ==="; kubectl -n mongodb get svc; echo "=== mongo-rs-0 spec ==="; kubectl -n mongodb get pod mongo-rs-0 -o jsonpath='{.spec.containers[*].image}'; echo; echo "=== prom config ==="; kubectl -n monitoring get cm prometheus-config -o yaml
input.description: Inspect mongo service and prom config

apiVersion: v1
data:
  prometheus.yml: |
    global:
      scrape_interval: 30s
    scrape_configs:
      - job_name: "prometheus"
        static_configs:
          - targets: ["localhost:9090"]

input.command: kubectl -n mongodb get statefulset -o yaml 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "MONGO_INITDB|env:|name:|value:" | head -40; echo "=== try auth ==="; kubectl -n mongodb exec mongo-rs-0 -- mongosh --quiet --eval "db.runCommand({connectionStatus:1})" 2>&1 | head -20
